title: Pork Gyoza Italian Wrap
description: A fusion twist on traditional Italian wraps, featuring Japanese-style pork gyoza and Italian seasonings.
instructions: 2. Pan-fry the gyoza until golden brown, then transfer to a baking sheet.
3. In a small bowl, mix together pesto sauce and Italian seasoning.
4. Spread a layer of the pesto sauce mixture on each gyoza.
5. Sprinkle mozzarella cheese over the pesto sauce.
6. Bake the gyoza in the oven for 10-12 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
7. Meanwhile, heat some olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
8. Add minced garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
9. Add a few drops of olive oil to a large tortilla and spread a layer of the garlic-infused oil.
10. Assemble the wraps by placing 4-5 gyoza on each tortilla, followed by some chopped fresh basil.
11. Drizzle the remaining pesto sauce over the top and serve immediately.
